nasb.text: Yet our eyes failed, Looking for help was useless; In our watching we have watched For a nation that could not save.

esv.text: Our eyes failed, ever watching vainly for help; in our watching we watched for a nation which could not save.

cnv.text: 我們徒然等待幫助，等到雙目失去視力； 我們在瞭望臺上期望一個不能拯救我們的國家來臨。

ccb.text: 我们望眼欲穿， 盼望援军的到来， 盼来的国家却无力拯救我们。
